overview.description: The Invesco Zacks Multi-Asset Income ETF (CVY) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Zacks Multi-Asset Income index. The fund tracks an index that aims to outperform the Dow Jones U.S. Select Dividend Index using US stocks, ADRs, REITS, MLPs, CEFs, and preferred stocks. CVY was launched on Sep 21, 2006 and is issued by Invesco.
